title: Prohibit Pnpm Artifacts In Bun Workspace
why: The repo package-manager contract is Bun-only; CI already rejects pnpm artifacts and H7 moves that feedback local.
remediate: Remove pnpm artifacts and use `bun install` so bun.lock remains the only package-manager lockfile.
message: pnpm artifacts are forbidden in this Bun-only repo.
